articles.title: When will social media ban start and what platforms are included?
articles.description: The measures will see apps including TikTok and Snapchat blocked for UK teens early in 2027.

articles.title: Trump heralds Iran deal but questions - and risks - remain
articles.description: The announcement of an Iran deal was a welcome birthday gift for the president – but its success or failure may hinge on the details.

articles.title: OnlyFans 'agents' control and threaten creators while taking half their earnings, BBC finds
articles.description: Dozens of women on OnlyFans describe being exploited by managers who promised to help maximise profits.

articles.title: Norwegian crown princess's son found guilty of two counts of rape
articles.description: Marius Borg Høiby, the 29-year-old son of Norway's Crown Princess Mette Marit, has been found guilty of two counts of rape and given four years in jail.
